content.content:
ec61cd6 Enable suspend-on-idle for all Fly apps across all environments (#20)
44358ec Unify balance deploys to build OCI images in infra, matching flux and gunk-web (#18)
372fc62 Add OCI image smoke tests to CI and deploy workflows (#15)
829c429 Fix gunk.dev apex DNS to use actual Fly IPs (#16)
556b524 Fix gunk-web health checks: put index.html at /srv to match Caddyfile root (#14)
